title: c01 alignment found; weak-pi center measured; Ramsey scout started

summary: Recovery hook follow-up: initial c01 pODMR AlignNVFailed event has already been recovered through TrackCenter recheck, strong-pi retry, weak-pi refinement, and a running Ramsey/T2star scout; no new bridge mutation.

Bridge-free Ramsey FFT expectation for c01: weak-pi center implies Bz about 359 G and 13C Larmor about 384 kHz; current 2 MHz det, 0..8 us, 51-point grid keeps carrier and expected sidebands below 3.125 MHz Nyquist, with 125 kHz bin spacing.

The c01 Ramsey/T2star scout remains the only running bridge job. During bridge-free work, recorded an FFT expectation from the weak-pi center: Bz about 359 G, 13C Larmor about 384 kHz, expected detuning carrier near 2.000 MHz and possible sidebands near 1.616/2.384 MHz on the 51-point 0..8 us grid. Updated work/state.md; no bridge mutation.
